title: 杭州首例“AI替岗”案：35岁主管被优化后赢了官司 | 原文
content: A 35-year-old AI quality-control supervisor in Hangzhou sued his employer after being demoted and later fired when AI upgrades made his role redundant. The company cited the technology's self-proofreading capability as grounds for dismissal. A court ruled in the employee's favor, finding the termination unlawful and ordering payment of double compensation plus outstanding wages. The case marks Hangzhou's first "AI replacement" labor dispute.

title: 致命的“糖浆”：维多利亚时代底层父母给婴儿喂鸦片剂的真相 | 原文
content: A Punch magazine cartoon from 1849 depicted "The Poor Child's Nurse"—an opium bottle. Working-class Victorian parents fed infants opium-based syrups to induce sleep so they could work long factory hours. The image showed an abandoned baby in a dilapidated home, highlighting how poverty forced desperate childcare choices.

They speculate Codex's AI image features might streamline this further and seek community feedback.

title: 菲律宾法院撤销剩余的马科斯非法所得案
content: A Philippine court has dismissed the remaining case seeking to recover allegedly ill-gotten wealth from the family of former dictator Ferdinand Marcos, according to Bloomberg. The decision marks a significant development in the long-running legal efforts to reclaim assets accumulated during Marcos's rule. The case's dismissal removes the last major legal challenge against the Marcos family's wealth, potentially affecting ongoing discussions about accountability for corruption during the martial law era. The ruling comes as Ferdinand Marcos Jr. currently serves as the Philippines' president.

Google's Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform introduces an agentic RAG system that handles complex, multi-source queries through specialized agents: an Orchestrator, Planner, Query Rewriter, and Search Fanout Agent. Its key innovation is a Sufficient Context Agent that checks retrieved information against the original query, identifies gaps, and triggers iterative searches until enough evidence is gathered. Tested on FramesQA with 824 queries across 2,676 documents, the system achieves 90.1% accuracy in cross-corpus settings—nearly matching single-corpus performance—with minimal latency increase. This represents up to 34% improvement in factuality over standard RAG.

title: 外卖大战一年：美团回不去、阿里停不下
content: A yearlong food delivery war has reshaped China's market. Meituan spent roughly 60 billion yuan to defend 50-55% market share, down from 75-80%, while sacrificing hundreds of billions in annual profit potential and valuation. Alibaba invested even more—85.7 billion yuan in reduced profits—but gained 45% market share, a foothold in instant retail, and strengthened Taobao's app engagement, with unit economics expected to turn positive soon. JD.com achieved single-digit to low double-digit share but faces a longer path to profitability due to smaller scale and higher per-order losses. The battle has shifted from aggressive expansion to efficiency optimization, while competition in broader instant retail intensifies.

He stated Doubao actually identified it as "chicken leg mushroom" with warnings about confusion with toxic lookalikes and advised against eating wild mushrooms.
